content_blocks.text:
Sl. 14

Sl. 14

of. सत्याचार्यः

cf. Satyacharya:

ओजाः पुरुषा ज्ञेया मेषात् स्वीसंक्ष‌का युग्माः ।
उद्देषूआः पुरुषाः सौम्या युग्मेषु भवनेषु ॥
चरसंज्ञाः स्थिरसंशाः द्विःप्रकृतिरिति राशयः क्रमशः ।
राशिस्वभावतुल्याजायन्त प्रकृतयः प्रसूतानाम् ।।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
ओजाः पुरुषा ज्ञेया मेषात् स्वीसंक्ष‌का युग्माः ।
उद्देषूआः पुरुषाः सौम्या युग्मेषु भवनेषु ॥
चरसंज्ञाः स्थिरसंशाः द्विःप्रकृतिरिति राशयः क्रमशः ।
राशिस्वभावतुल्याजायन्त प्रकृतयः प्रसूतानाम् ।।
verse_data.topic: Classification of signs by gender, nature, and type

content_blocks.text: The signs Mesha (Aries) and others are known to be odd-numbered (masculine), and the even-numbered ones (feminine). The odd-numbered ones are masculine, and the even-numbered ones are feminine. The signs are called respectively movable, fixed, and dual-natured. The natures of the signs are determined by their respective qualities.

verse_data.translation: The signs Mesha (Aries) and others are known to be odd-numbered (masculine), and the even-numbered ones (feminine). The odd-numbered ones are masculine, and the even-numbered ones are feminine. The signs are called respectively movable, fixed, and dual-natured. The natures of the signs are determined by their respective qualities.
verse_data.topic: Classification of signs by gender, nature, and type

content_blocks.text: The sign Meena is stated to be of even length, but it will be seen from sicka 56 infra that the sign's length is represented by the number 20 and should therefore be classed as a short sign.

c/. सारावली.

cf. Saravali.

हस्वास्तिमिगेाजघटा मिथुनधनुःककिंमृगमुखाश्च समाः ।
वृश्चिककन्या मृगपतिवणिजो दीर्घाः समाख्याताः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
हस्वास्तिमिगेाजघटा मिथुनधनुःककिंमृगमुखाश्च समाः ।
वृश्चिककन्या मृगपतिवणिजो दीर्घाः समाख्याताः ॥

content_blocks.text: Hastī (Leo), Timi (Pisces), Gaja (Cancer), Mithuna (Gemini), Dhanu (Sagittarius), Karkī (Cancer), and Mriga (Taurus) are of medium length. Vrishchika (Scorpio), Kanya (Virgo), Mrigapati (Leo), and Vanija (Gemini) are long.

verse_data.translation: Hastī (Leo), Timi (Pisces), Gaja (Cancer), Mithuna (Gemini), Dhanu (Sagittarius), Karkī (Cancer), and Mriga (Taurus) are of medium length. Vrishchika (Scorpio), Kanya (Virgo), Mrigapati (Leo), and Vanija (Gemini) are long.

content_blocks.text: Vidralso notes to that sloka.

दिगीशत्वप्रयोजनं तु । सूतिकागृहद्वारशानं, तथा इतनटादिषु चौरादेर्याने दिीग्वशांन च
तथा च.
यातव्यदिस्वगतस्य सुखेन सिद्धिः व्यर्थश्रमों भवति दितिलोमलग्नः ॥ इति.

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
दिगीशत्वप्रयोजनं तु । सूतिकागृहद्वारशानं, तथा इतनटादिषु चौरादेर्याने दिीग्वशांन च
तथा च.
यातव्यदिस्वगतस्य सुखेन सिद्धिः व्यर्थश्रमों भवति दितिलोमलग्नः ॥ इति.

content_blocks.text: The purpose of the lords of directions is for the examination of the birthplace, the door of the lying-in-room, and also for the journey of thieves and others, according to the directions. It is said that success in travel is achieved with ease, and a fruitless effort results if the ascendant is in the direction of the destination.

verse_data.translation: The purpose of the lords of directions is for the examination of the birthplace, the door of the lying-in-room, and also for the journey of thieves and others, according to the directions. It is said that success in travel is achieved with ease, and a fruitless effort results if the ascendant is in the direction of the destination.

content_blocks.text:
वीर्योपेता निशि वृषनृयुक्‌कार्कचापाजनक्रा
हित्वा युग्म भवनमपरे पृष्ठपूर्वोदयाश्च ।
शेषाः शीर्षोदयदिनबलाः श्रेष्ठताराशयस्ते
मीनाकारद्वयम्नुभयतः काललनं समेति ॥ १४ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
वीर्योपेता निशि वृषनृयुक्‌कार्कचापाजनक्रा
हित्वा युग्म भवनमपरे पृष्ठपूर्वोदयाश्च ।
शेषाः शीर्षोदयदिनबलाः श्रेष्ठताराशयस्ते
मीनाकारद्वयम्नुभयतः काललनं समेति ॥ १४ ॥
verse_data.topic: Strength of signs during day and night

content_blocks.text: Vrishabha (Taurus), Mithuna (Gemini), Kataka (Cancer), and Dhanu (Sagittarius) are strong at night. The rest, except the dual-bodied signs, rise with their rear portion first (Prishtodaya). The remaining signs are strong during the day and rise with their heads first (Shirodhaya). These are the best among the signs. The two fish-shaped signs (Pisces) rise with both their front and rear portions, and are considered to be of medium strength.

verse_data.translation: Vrishabha (Taurus), Mithuna (Gemini), Kataka (Cancer), and Dhanu (Sagittarius) are strong at night. The rest, except the dual-bodied signs, rise with their rear portion first (Prishtodaya). The remaining signs are strong during the day and rise with their heads first (Shirodhaya). These are the best among the signs. The two fish-shaped signs (Pisces) rise with both their front and rear portions, and are considered to be of medium strength.
verse_data.topic: Strength of signs during day and night

content_blocks.text:
Sloka. 14.

Sloka. 14.

Vrishabha, Mithuna, Kataka, Dhanus
Mesha and Makara possess strength at night. These
excepting the sign Mithuna rise with their rear portion
first. The rest appear with their heads and have
strength during the day. They are also termed signs
characterised by superiority. The rising sign at any
given time, if represented by a couple of fish figures is
to come under both the Prishtodaya (पृष्ठोदय) and
Seershodaya (शीषर्योदय).

verse_data.translation:
Vrishabha, Mithuna, Kataka, Dhanus
Mesha and Makara possess strength at night. These
excepting the sign Mithuna rise with their rear portion
first. The rest appear with their heads and have
strength during the day. They are also termed signs
characterised by superiority. The rising sign at any
given time, if represented by a couple of fish figures is
to come under both the Prishtodaya (पृष्ठोदय) and
Seershodaya (शीषर्योदय).
verse_data.topic: Strength of signs during day and night

content_blocks.text:
०८. पराशरजातक

cf. Parashara Jataka

NOTES

NOTES

दिवा शीर्योदयाश्चैव सन्ध्यायामुभयोदयाः। नक्तं पृष्ठोदयाश्चैव बलाधिक्या उदीरिताः ॥

They are said to have greater strength during the day (Shirodhaya), at twilight (Ubhaya-daya), and at night (Prishtodaya).

Also शम्भुहोराप्रकाश

Also Shambhu Horaprakash
मेषो वृषद्वन्द्रकुलरिचापकुरङ्गवस्त्राश्च निशाबलाः स्युः ।
Mesha (Aries), Vrishabha (Taurus), Mithuna (Gemini), Karka (Cancer), Dhanu (Sagittarius), and Makara (Capricorn) have strength at night.

verse_data.translation: Mesha (Aries), Vrishabha (Taurus), Mithuna (Gemini), Karka (Cancer), Dhanu (Sagittarius), and Makara (Capricorn) have strength at night.
